instruction: In CS101, determine whether applying the drop-lowest policy changes your letter grade (A >= 90, B >= 80, C >= 70, D >= 60, F < 60). Compute your weighted grade both with and without the drop. If dropping the lowest changes your letter grade to a higher one, submit 'letter_grade_report.pdf' for the lowest-scoring homework (the one that would be dropped). If dropping the lowest does NOT change your letter grade, mark the course's latest announcement as read to confirm you have reviewed the drop policy.
